attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
WRIRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
CASE WHEN WRIRM.SALES_ORDER_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WRIRM.SALES_ORDER_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 ELSE WRIRM.SALES_ORDER_KEY END SALES_ORDER_KEY 
, CASE WHEN WRIRM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WRIRM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 ELSE WRIRM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
, CASE WHEN WRIRM.PRODUCT_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WRIRM.PRODUCT_KEY=-998 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN WRIRM.PRODUCT_KEY=-997 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1 ELSE WRIRM.PRODUCT_KEY END PRODUCT_KEY 
, CASE WHEN WRIRM.AR_TRX_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WRIRM.AR_TRX_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 ELSE WRIRM.AR_TRX_KEY END AR_TRX_KEY 
, CASE WHEN WRIRM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WRIRM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 ELSE WRIRM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
, CASE WHEN WRIRM.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WRIRM.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 ELSE WRIRM.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY END BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
, CASE WHEN WRIRM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WRIRM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END END_CUSTOMER_KEY 
, CASE WHEN WRIRM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WRIRM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
, CASE WHEN WRIRM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WRIRM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
, CASE WHEN WRIRM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WRIRM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
, CASE WHEN WRIRM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WRIRM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY END SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
WRIRM.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
WRIRM.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
WRIRM.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
CASE WHEN WRIRM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT IN (-9999,-999) THEN RANDOM(1000000,1003000)*-1 ELSE WRIRM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT END BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT  
, CASE WHEN WRIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT=-9999 THEN RANDOM(8000000,8001800)*-1 WHEN WRIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT=-999 THEN RANDOM(8005000,8006800)*-1 ELSE WRIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT END BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT 
, CASE WHEN WRIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT=-9999 THEN RANDOM(8000000,8001800)*-1 WHEN WRIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT=-999 THEN RANDOM(8005000,8006800)*-1 ELSE WRIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT END BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT ,
WRIRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
WRIRM.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
WRIRM.DD_GL_DATETIME,
WRIRM.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,
WRIRM.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
WRIRM.DV_FISCAL_DT,
WRIRM.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
WRIRM.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD,
WRIRM.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
WRIRM.DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
WRIRM.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
WRIRM.AR_TRX_DATETIME,
WRIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
WRIRM.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
WRIRM.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
WRIRM.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
WRIRM.DV_CHARGES_FLG,
WRIRM.DV_MISC_FLG,
WRIRM.DV_SERVICE_FLG,
WRIRM.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
WRIRM.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
WRIRM.DV_REVENUE_FLG,
WRIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
WRIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
WRIRM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRC_AMT,
WRIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
WRIRM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT,
WRIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
WRIRM.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
WRIRM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
WRIRM.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
WRIRM.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY,
WRIRM.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME ,
WRIRM.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
WRIRM.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD,
WRIRM.GL_DT,
WRIRM.BK_SS_CD,
WRIRM.DV_EXTENDED_QTY,
WRIRM.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
WRIRM.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
WRIRM.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
WRIRM.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
WRIRM.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
WRIRM.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
WRIRM.TRANSACTION_DT,
WRIRM.GL_POSTED_DTM,
WRIRM.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
WRIRM.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT,
WRIRM.DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT,
WRIRM.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT,
WRIRM.SPLIT_PCT,
WRIRM.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
WRIRM.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
WRIRM.DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG, 
WRIRM.DV_RESTATED_OR_ACTUAL_FLG	,
WRIRM.RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG
,(CASE WHEN (WRIRM.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY = -999) THEN RANDOM (1000000, 1001800)*-1 ELSE WRIRM.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY END) REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY   /* Performance changes, as part of APR- FY17 CDR */      
,WRIRM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       
,WRIRM.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
,WRIRM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                
,WRIRM.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
,WRIRM.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID                
,WRIRM.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD           
,WRIRM.DV_FMV_FLG                    
,WRIRM.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD     
,WRIRM.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT        
,WRIRM.DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT   
,WRIRM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            
,(CASE WHEN (WRIRM.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = -999) THEN RANDOM (1000000, 1001800)*-1 ELSE WRIRM.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY END) XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY 
/* Performance changes, as part of APR- FY17 CDR */
,WRIRM.BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME   
/*PRMADDAL: Added below 4 columns as part of Q3FY17 RO SCOPE*/
,WRIRM.XCAT_FLG
,WRIRM.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
,WRIRM.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG  
,WRIRM.ELA_FLG  
,RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 AS ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY 
,0 AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT
 ,WRIRM.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD   	
,'UNKNOWN' AS POB_TYPE_CD                   
,'N' AS NRS_TRANSITION_FLG 
,'Immediate' AS BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME /*Added as part of Q3FY20 ICPM FEB REL */ 
,RFDP.DV_FISCAL_YR_MNTH_WEEK_NUM_INT AS DV_TRX_FSC_YR_MTH_WK_NUM_INT  /*ADDED AS PART OF JUNE WEEKLY_BILLINGS FY20*/
,'='  NET_PRICE_FLG
,'='  CISCO_INTERNAL_POS_FLG
FROM  $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_IDRCT_INV_REV_MEASURE  WRIRM
/*ADDED AS PART OF JUNE WEEKLY_BILLINGS FY20*/
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD
ON RFD.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=WRIRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFDP
ON RFDP.CALENDAR_DATE=COALESCE(Cast(WRIRM.GL_POSTED_DTM AS DATE),RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE)
/*ADDED AS PART OF JUNE WEEKLY_BILLINGS FY20*/
